name: Artificers’ Guild
type: Soreheim relic-technology and magical integration faction
summary: Alliance artificers tasked with integrating relics and rare controlled magic into industry under strict oversight.
motive: Convert rare magical knowledge into durable Alliance advantage without allowing uncontrolled arcane disruption.
methods: restricted workshop collaboration with Decon Von Reckshem
power_relations: Operates under Giant Council toleration and Decon Von Reckshem’s oversight
Intersects with Engineers’ Consortium and Fire Giant forge systems
visible_membership_base: Artificers, controlled enchanters, relic technicians, and forge-linked prototype crews.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: The same prestige that protects the guild also makes it a target for theft, suspicion, and political leverage.
